summary: Super Admin Ecosystem Control & Commercial Controls Pack testing completed. All backend APIs tested (30/30 passing). Frontend pages verified - Ecosystem Dashboard, Group Markups, Partner Settlements, and Payment Proofs all loading correctly with data.

ecosystem_dashboard.notes: All 5 endpoints return expected data structure. Dashboard shows revenue (TZS 1,118,000), orders (36), partners, affiliates, country expansion status

group_markup_settings.notes: Full CRUD operations working. Validates duplicate prevention, product/service group rules

partner_settlements.notes: Payout profiles and settlements CRUD working. Summary statistics endpoint returns correct counts

payment_proofs.notes: Complete payment proof workflow working - submit, list, approve, reject

pricing_validation.notes: Margin protection logic working. Correctly flags low-margin items and adjusts discounts

frontend_pages.notes: All pages load with proper data-testid attributes and display data correctly

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Route order issue - /admin/summary was placed after /admin/{proof_id}, causing 500 errors
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Moved /admin/summary route before /admin/{proof_id} to ensure proper routing

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Payment proof approval failed when invoice_id was not a valid ObjectId
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added try/catch and fallback to search by invoice_number if ObjectId conversion fails

critical_code_review_comments: All APIs use module-level db connection pattern correctly
ObjectId serialization handled via serialize_doc() helper
Frontend pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Margin protection logic correctly validates and adjusts discounts
seed_data_creation: Test data created for markup settings, payout profiles, and payment proofs (prefixed with TEST_)

mocked_apis.note: Resend email service and KwikPay payment service are mocked (awaiting credentials)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin Ecosystem Control & Commercial Controls pack fully tested. All backend APIs working. Frontend pages at /admin/ecosystem-dashboard, /admin/group-markups, /admin/partner-settlements, /admin/payment-proofs all functional. Route order bug in payment_proof_routes.py was fixed. Admin login works via /admin/login with provided credentials.
